calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Request To Set A Motion Date For Proveup And Points & Authorities Supporting A Default Judgment (Requests)
Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on calendar for Default Judgment prove-up hearing as to Defendant Thad Knudson.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40:56 a.m. and concluding at 10:03:22 a.m. (D505)

Tiffany Norman, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Ryan Steele via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Ryan Steele was placed under oath via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Thad Knudson not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract, quantum meruit and fraud and deceit filed October 17, 2022.
Proof of personal service as to defendant Thad Knudson served on January 16, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on February 17, 2023
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1 through 10 on June 12, 2023
Notice and proof of service of hearing filed October 25, 2023.

The Court addresses counsel on the causes of action and for an offer of proof.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Rental Agreement
Exhibit B: Complaint
Exhibit C: Text messages
Exhibit D: Proof of service
Exhibit E: Entry of Default
Exhibit F: Accounting Ledger
Exhibit G: Itemized accounting of the security deposit
Exhibit i: costs
Exhibit ii: Legal services
Exhibit 1: email and text communications.

Counsel to attest as to what the witness will testify to.

The Court confirms with the witness that all statements made by counsel except for the itemization of attorneys fees and the declarations made are true and correct.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff's witness and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ryan Steele Trustee of the Steele Family Trust and against Thad Knudson as follows:

Damages $21,628.86
Interest $ 2,100.00
Attorney's Fees $9,792.50
Costs $1,190.40
Total Judgment of $34,711.76

The Court denies the request of trebling of damages.

Counsel to submit proposed order for review and signature of the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request To Set A Motion Date For Proveup
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Oct-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
